question: What is progress status Changeover
sql:
"

SELECT TOP 100 
    wip_order.WipOrderNo, 
    wip_order.WipOrderType, 
    wip_operation.ProgressStatus, 
    wip_operation.TextID
FROM 
    WIP_ORDER AS wip_order
JOIN 
    WIP_OPERATION AS wip_operation 
    ON wip_order.WipOrderNo = wip_operation.WipOrderNo 
    AND wip_order.WipOrderType = wip_operation.WipOrderType
WHERE 
    wip_operation.ProgressStatus = 'Changeover'

question: I want to find out which SAP PO is running on machine HUX211 without data filter. Join wip_req_resource with Resource_ table (ResourceName & ResourceType) and use Resource_.Name to filter machine name. Also add a filter that Resource_.ResourceType 6 is machine. And in the select only output SAP_PO and no other columns. Use simple aliases for tables
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT wo.ParentWIPOrderNo AS SAP_PO
FROM WIP_ORDER wo
JOIN WIP_OPERATION wop ON wo.WipOrderNo = wop.WipOrderNo AND wo.WipOrderType = wop.WipOrderType
JOIN WIP_REQ_RESOURCE wr ON wop.WipOrderNo = wr.WipOrderNo AND wop.WipOrderType = wr.WipOrderType
JOIN RESOURCE_ r ON wr.ResourceName = r.ResourceName AND wr.ResourceType = r.ResourceType
WHERE r.Name = 'HUX211' AND r.ResourceType = 6
TOP 100

question: What is the ResourceName for machine HUXC211
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT r.ResourceName
FROM RESOURCE_ r
WHERE r.Name = 'HUXC211' AND r.ResourceType = 6
TOP 100

question: What is the ProductNo of the Wip order running on machine B1001. Join Product table with Wip_order using productID= Product.ID
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.ProductNo
FROM WIP_ORDER wo
JOIN PRODUCT p ON wo.ProductID = p.ID
JOIN WIP_OPERATION wop ON wo.WipOrderNo = wop.WipOrderNo AND wo.WipOrderType = wop.WipOrderType
JOIN WIP_REQ_RESOURCE wr ON wop.WipOrderNo = wr.WipOrderNo AND wop.WipOrderType = wr.WipOrderType
JOIN RESOURCE_ r ON wr.ResourceName = r.ResourceName AND wr.ResourceType = r.ResourceType
WHERE r.Name = 'B1001' AND r.ResourceType = 6
TOP 100

question: What is the productno of wip order XY1234. keep in mind, wipordertype = 1 means MES order and WipOrderType = 23 means SAP order. Always use MES order type unless specified otherwise.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.ProductNo
FROM WIP_ORDER wo
JOIN PRODUCT p ON wo.ProductID = p.ID
WHERE wo.WipOrderNo = 'XY1234' AND wo.WipOrderType = 1
TOP 100

question: What is the productno of SAP order SAP89456
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.ProductNo
FROM WIP_ORDER wo
JOIN PRODUCT p ON wo.ProductID = p.ID
WHERE wo.WipOrderNo = 'SAP89456' AND wo.WipOrderType = 23
TOP 100

question: List SAP POs have product Number P0090091
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT wo.ParentWIPOrderNo AS SAP_PO
FROM WIP_ORDER wo
JOIN PRODUCT p ON wo.ProductID = p.ID
WHERE p.ProductNo = 'P0090091' AND wo.WipOrderType = 23
TOP 100

question: Which machines have orders on them belonging to product P9800901
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT r.Name AS Machine_Name
FROM WIP_ORDER wo
JOIN PRODUCT p ON wo.ProductID = p.ID
JOIN WIP_OPERATION wop ON wo.WipOrderNo = wop.WipOrderNo AND wo.WipOrderType = wop.WipOrderType
JOIN WIP_REQ_RESOURCE wr ON wop.WipOrderNo = wr.WipOrderNo AND wop.WipOrderType = wr.WipOrderType
JOIN RESOURCE_ r ON wr.ResourceName = r.ResourceName AND wr.ResourceType = r.ResourceType
WHERE p.ProductNo = 'P9800901' AND r.ResourceType = 6
TOP 100

question: Fetch the description of product P09000123. No need to join wip_order
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT tt.Short AS Product_Description
FROM PRODUCT p
JOIN TEXT_TRANSLATION tt ON p.TextID = tt.TextID AND tt.LanguageID = 1033
WHERE p.ProductNo = 'P09000123'
TOP 100

question: Show top 25 orders in Changeover status and on which machine these are planned on
sql:
SELECT TOP 25 wo.WipOrderNo, r.Name AS Machine_Name
FROM WIP_ORDER wo
JOIN WIP_OPERATION wop ON wo.WipOrderNo = wop.WipOrderNo AND wo.WipOrderType = wop.WipOrderType
JOIN PROGRESS_STATUS ps ON wop.ProgressStatus = ps.ProgressStatus
JOIN WIP_REQ_RESOURCE wr ON wop.WipOrderNo = wr.WipOrderNo AND wop.WipOrderType = wr.WipOrderType
JOIN RESOURCE_ r ON wr.ResourceName = r.ResourceName AND wr.ResourceType = r.ResourceType
WHERE ps.Name = 'Changeover' AND r.ResourceType = 6

question: I want to create a report with following fields. WipOrder, Machine, ProductDesc, OrderStatus, Sap po, Sap Po Created date
sql:
SELECT 
    wo.WipOrderNo AS WipOrder,
    r.Name AS Machine,
    tt.Short AS ProductDesc,
    ps.Name AS OrderStatus,
    wo.ParentWIPOrderNo AS Sap_po,
    wo.CreatedOn AS Sap_Po_Created_Date
FROM WIP_ORDER wo
JOIN PRODUCT p ON wo.ProductID = p.ID
JOIN TEXT_TRANSLATION tt ON p.TextID = tt.TextID AND tt.LanguageID = 1033
JOIN WIP_OPERATION wop ON wo.WipOrderNo = wop.WipOrderNo AND wo.WipOrderType = wop.WipOrderType
JOIN PROGRESS_STATUS ps ON wop.ProgressStatus = ps.ProgressStatus
JOIN WIP_REQ_RESOURCE wr ON wop.WipOrderNo = wr.WipOrderNo AND wop.WipOrderType = wr.WipOrderType
JOIN RESOURCE_ r ON wr.ResourceName = r.ResourceName AND wr.ResourceType = r.ResourceType
WHERE r.ResourceType = 6
TOP 100

question: I want to create a report with following fields. WipOrder, Machine, ProductDesc, OrderStatus, Sap po, Sap Po Created date. Since I need created date for SAP PO,need to join WIP_order WO with WIP_Order WO_SAP and fetch createdon of WO_SAP. wo_sap.WipOrderNo to be used as Sap_PO
sql:
SELECT 
    wo.WipOrderNo AS WipOrder,
    r.Name AS Machine,
    tt.Short AS ProductDesc,
    ps.Name AS OrderStatus,
    wo_sap.WipOrderNo AS Sap_PO,
    wo_sap.CreatedOn AS Sap_Po_Created_Date
FROM WIP_ORDER wo
JOIN WIP_OPERATION wop ON wo.WipOrderNo = wop.WipOrderNo AND wo.WipOrderType = wop.WipOrderType
JOIN WIP_REQ_RESOURCE wr ON wop.WipOrderNo = wr.WipOrderNo AND wop.WipOrderType = wr.WipOrderType
JOIN RESOURCE_ r ON wr.ResourceName = r.ResourceName AND wr.ResourceType = r.ResourceType
JOIN PRODUCT p ON wo.ProductID = p.ID
JOIN TEXT_TRANSLATION tt ON p.TextID = tt.TextID AND tt.LanguageID = 1033
JOIN WIP_ORDER wo_sap ON wo.ParentWIPOrderNo = wo_sap.WipOrderNo AND wo.ParentWIPOrderType = wo_sap.WipOrderType
JOIN PROGRESS_STATUS ps ON wop.ProgressStatus = ps.ProgressStatus
WHERE r.ResourceType = 6
TOP 100

question: I want to create a report with following fields. WipOrder, Machine, ProductDesc, OrderStatus, Sap po, Sap Po Created date. For join of wip_operation add a condition of InsideProcessFlag=1
sql:
SELECT 
    wo.WipOrderNo AS WipOrder,
    r.Name AS Machine,
    tt.Short AS ProductDesc,
    ps.Name AS OrderStatus,
    wo_sap.WipOrderNo AS Sap_PO,
    wo_sap.CreatedOn AS Sap_Po_Created_Date
FROM WIP_ORDER wo
JOIN WIP_OPERATION wop ON wo.WipOrderNo = wop.WipOrderNo AND wo.WipOrderType = wop.WipOrderType AND wop.InsideProcessFlag = 1
JOIN WIP_REQ_RESOURCE wr ON wop.WipOrderNo = wr.WipOrderNo AND wop.WipOrderType = wr.WipOrderType
JOIN RESOURCE_ r ON wr.ResourceName = r.ResourceName AND wr.ResourceType = r.ResourceType
JOIN PRODUCT p ON wo.ProductID = p.ID
JOIN TEXT_TRANSLATION tt ON p.TextID = tt.TextID AND tt.LanguageID = 1033
JOIN WIP_ORDER wo_sap ON wo.ParentWIPOrderNo = wo_sap.WipOrderNo AND wo.ParentWIPOrderType = wo_sap.WipOrderType
JOIN PROGRESS_STATUS ps ON wop.ProgressStatus = ps.ProgressStatus
WHERE r.ResourceType = 6
TOP 100

question: I want to create a report with following fields. WipOrder, Machine, ProductDesc, OrderStatus, Sap po, Sap Po Created date
sql:
SELECT 
    wo.WipOrderNo AS WipOrder,
    r.Name AS Machine,
    tt.Short AS ProductDesc,
    ps.Name AS OrderStatus,
    wo_sap.WipOrderNo AS Sap_PO,
    wo_sap.CreatedOn AS Sap_Po_Created_Date
FROM WIP_ORDER wo
JOIN WIP_OPERATION wop ON wo.WipOrderNo = wop.WipOrderNo AND wo.WipOrderType = wop.WipOrderType
JOIN WIP_REQ_RESOURCE wr ON wop.WipOrderNo = wr.WipOrderNo AND wop.WipOrderType = wr.WipOrderType
JOIN RESOURCE_ r ON wr.ResourceName = r.ResourceName AND wr.ResourceType = r.ResourceType
JOIN PRODUCT p ON wo.ProductID = p.ID
JOIN TEXT_TRANSLATION tt ON p.TextID = tt.TextID AND tt.LanguageID = 1033
JOIN WIP_ORDER wo_sap ON wo.ParentWIPOrderNo = wo_sap.WipOrderNo AND wo.ParentWIPOrderType = wo_sap.WipOrderType
JOIN PROGRESS_STATUS ps ON wop.ProgressStatus = ps.ProgressStatus
WHERE r.ResourceType = 6
TOP 100

question: I want to create a report with following fields. WipOrder, Machine, ProductDesc, OrderStatus, Sap po, Sap Po Created date. While joining wip_operation, always use InsideProcessFlag = 1 condition
sql:
SELECT 
    wo.WipOrderNo AS WipOrder,
    r.Name AS Machine,
    tt.Short AS ProductDesc,
    ps.Name AS OrderStatus,
    wo_sap.WipOrderNo AS Sap_PO,
    wo_sap.CreatedOn AS Sap_Po_Created_Date
FROM WIP_ORDER wo
JOIN WIP_OPERATION wop ON wo.WipOrderNo = wop.WipOrderNo AND wo.WipOrderType = wop.WipOrderType AND wop.InsideProcessFlag = 1
JOIN WIP_REQ_RESOURCE wr ON wop.WipOrderNo = wr.WipOrderNo AND wop.WipOrderType = wr.WipOrderType
JOIN RESOURCE_ r ON wr.ResourceName = r.ResourceName AND wr.ResourceType = r.ResourceType
JOIN PRODUCT p ON wo.ProductID = p.ID
JOIN TEXT_TRANSLATION tt ON p.TextID = tt.TextID AND tt.LanguageID = 1033
JOIN WIP_ORDER wo_sap ON wo.ParentWIPOrderNo = wo_sap.WipOrderNo AND wo.ParentWIPOrderType = wo_sap.WipOrderType
JOIN PROGRESS_STATUS ps ON wop.ProgressStatus = ps.ProgressStatus
WHERE r.ResourceType = 6
TOP 100
